nasb.text: Behold, I have made your face as hard as their faces and your forehead as hard as their foreheads.

esv.text: Behold, I have made your face as hard as their faces, and your forehead as hard as their foreheads.

cnv.text: 看哪！我要使你的臉像他們的臉一樣堅硬，使你的前額像他們的前額一樣堅硬。

ccb.text: 不过，我要使你的脸像他们的脸一样硬，使你的额像他们的额一样硬。
